summary: Opus 3-tier catalyst sweep (chunk 13 (NBN-OLN)): scan -> deep -> skeptic

survivors_flagged.one_line: Neogen — signed $160M Genomics sale to Zoetis closing by end of 1H-FY27 plus ongoing portfolio-simplification/deleveraging toward <3x; real dated structural milestone but slow-burn and partly priced.

Nexa Resources — Votorantim selling 64.7% control stake (~$1.41B) to an unnamed European buyer, not yet closed; control change should trigger a minority tender, and a May-13 Cajamarquilla smelter fire adds a near-term zinc supply/overhang angle — forward, not fired.

Neurogene — NGN-401 Rett gene therapy with FDA Breakthrough Therapy; Embolden registrational dosing completes Q2-26 and 12-month interim Ph1/2 safety+efficacy data due mid-2026 — a real dated binary, single-asset risk.

Pending ~$560M skilled-nursing portfolio sale; HSR early-termination cleared May 26 2026, close expected on/about July 1 2026 (hard dated milestone) + post-proxy-battle governance reset and change-in-control incentives aligning toward potential sale.
Phase 3 ZENITH-AD start 2Q26 + REZOLVE-AA extension data on Citi 30-day catalyst watch; dated, but Phase 2b already drove a big re-rate so asymmetry partly priced.
KOASTAL-2 + KOASTAL-3 Phase 3 navacaprant joint topline readout in 2Q26 — dated binary; busted-biotech optionality after KOASTAL-1 miss with two redesigned >400-pt trials.
De-SPAC with Abra Financial ($750M, ABRX), definitive agreement, outside date Oct 15 2026; structurally weak (digital-asset SPAC, $40M min-cash, redemption risk, no vote date set).
Bexobrutideg CLL oral readout at EHA2026 on June 14 (hard date, ~1wk out); prior ORR 80.9% sets high bar — incremental Ph1a/b update, modest asymmetry, sell-the-news risk.

Union Pacific $320/sh stock-and-cash takeover; ~5% spread, complicated STB review (supplemental info due Jul 27 2026, decision late-26/27) with BNSF/CN/CPKC/CSX opposition — classic complex merger-arb.

Live self-initiated portfolio simplification: strategic review of Phosphate (sale alternatives), Trinidad Nitrogen, Brazil Retail; 'solidify optimal path in 2026.' Real structural catalyst but soft-dated, no hard milestone, no activist.
Two dated PDUFAs: zidesamtinib 9/18/26 + neladalkib (Priority Review) 11/27/26, both NDAs accepted. Real imminent dated binaries, but approval is consensus on strong pivotal data -> asymmetry muted.
METIS brain-mets-from-NSCLC PMA: final module submitted, FDA decision expected Q4-2026 -> one real dated regulatory binary. (Pancreatic Optune Pax already approved Feb-2026/fired.) Broad Q4 window.
All-stock MoE with Black Hills (Bright Horizon), shareholders approved Apr-2-26, pending FERC+MT/NE/SD approvals, close H2-26; real dated milestone but thin all-stock spread, BKH is 56% acquirer.
Nexstar/Tegna merger HALTED by lower-court order; Nexstar filed for expedited appellate review (May-20-26) = live complicated merger-arb with a dated legal milestone and binary outcome.

Definitive all-cash merger: Sun Pharma to acquire at $14.00/sh ($11.75B EV), announced Apr 26 2026, PREM14A filed, guidance/calls suspended pending close - live merger-arb with dated vote/regulatory milestones.
OPERA-01 Ph3 single-agent palazestrant topline expected in 2026 (Fast Track, ER+/HER2- mBC); real dated binary but loose 2026 window and standard readout, not special-situation asymmetry.

verified.catalyst: Signed $160M sale of Genomics (GeneSeek) business to Zoetis, with net proceeds funding deleveraging toward net debt/adj-EBITDA below 3x as part of a portfolio-simplification turnaround.
verified.dated_milestone: Deal close by end of 1H-FY27 (Neogen FY ends May, i.e. ~Nov 2026 / "Q2 2027"); company targets net leverage <3x by end of CY2026. Next checkpoint: Q4 FY26 earnings (~July 2026) for close progress/regulatory clearance.
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty: Zoetis) + G2 (concrete commitment: definitive $160M agreement, proceeds earmarked for debt reduction, signed 2026-03-02)
verified.edge: L-to-M — milestone is concrete, dated, and forward (regulatory-only gate, not yet closed), but deal is small ($160M / ~$90M divested rev vs ~$1.9B mkt cap), well-telegraphed since March, and stock already sits mid-range ($8.90 vs $11.43 high / $7.91 200d), so the deleveraging re-rate is only partly unpriced and surprise is limited.
verified.primary_source: Neogen press release / BusinessWire, "Neogen Announces Sale of Genomics Business to Zoetis," 2026-03-02; reaffirmed in Q3 FY26 results, BusinessWire/8-K, 2026-04-09.
verified.analysis: Neogen has a genuine, specific, dated structural catalyst: a definitive agreement (announced 2026-03-02) to sell its global Genomics/GeneSeek unit to Zoetis for $160M, closing by end of 1H-FY27 with proceeds funding deleveraging toward <3x net debt/EBITDA by end-CY2026 — confirmed and reiterated at Q3 FY26 earnings on 2026-04-09. It clears the gates (named counterparty, concrete commitment, dated, forward/not closed, not a macro bet), but it is a slow-burn deleveraging/turnaround story with modest absolute size and a routine regulatory-only close gate, so it's partly priced and offers limited near-term edge. WATCH/score 5 is appropriate; the next watch point is the FY26 Q4 print (~July 2026) for close timing and regulatory clearance, with the close itself (~Nov 2026) the structural trigger.

verified.catalyst: Votorantim is negotiating the sale of its 64.7% controlling stake in Nexa (~$1.41B / R$7B) to an unnamed European buyer; a control change could (unconfirmed) trigger a minority tender, but the deal is unsigned and the buyer undisclosed.
verified.dated_milestone: No dated milestone — no signed SPA or announced closing date; last hard report April 20, 2026 (still "in negotiations"). Next likely signpost: a definitive-agreement 6-K/press release (none scheduled).
verified.instrument: stock (no specific tradeable forward instrument justified)
verified.bloom_gates: None pass. G1 fails — counterparty explicitly unnamed ("a European company"). G2 fails — no concrete committed action; the minority tender is the screener's own inference, not a stated commitment. G3 fails — no specific currently-unpriced figure/date for any minority offer.
verified.edge: L — the $1.41B/64.7% sale is widely reported (Kitco/MINING.COM/BNamericas, Apr 20), so it is priced/known; the only potential edge (a mandatory minority tender at a premium) is unconfirmed and likely inapplicable since NEXA is Luxembourg-domiciled/NYSE-listed, not subject to a Brazilian OPA.
verified.primary_source: Kitco/Reuters, "Brazil's Votorantim close to selling controlling stake in Nexa Resources," Apr 20, 2026 (corroborated by MINING.COM and BNamericas); Cajamarquilla resumption: Newsfile/Nexa update May 29, 2026 and Zacks "NEXA Resumes Cajamarquilla Smelter Operations," June 1, 2026.
verified.analysis: The control-stake sale is real and specific on size (64.7%, ~$1.41B/R$7B) but the counterparty is undisclosed and the transaction is still in negotiation with no signed agreement or closing date — so it fails the named-counterparty and dated-forward gates. The triage's tradeable thesis hinges on a minority tender offer that no source confirms and that likely does not auto-apply to a Luxembourg-domiciled NYSE issuer, making it speculation rather than a concrete unpriced catalyst. Separately, the May-13 Cajamarquilla fire is already resolving (operations resumed per May 29 / June 1 updates, lost output to be recovered in 2026), so the supply-overhang angle is largely fired, not forward.

verified.catalyst: Neurogene's NGN-401 Rett gene therapy faces two near-term binaries: Embolden registrational-trial dosing completion in Q2-2026 and a dated interim Ph1/2 safety+efficacy readout (>=12-month follow-up on all 10 participants) in mid-2026.
verified.dated_milestone: Embolden dosing complete Q2-2026 (~90% dosed as of Q1 report); interim Ph1/2 12-mo safety+efficacy data mid-2026 (next: ~Q3-2026)
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (dated corporate commitment to registrational dosing completion + interim readout window); partial G3 (mid-2026 12-mo interim efficacy is a specific currently-unpriced figure that re-rates a $419M single-asset name)
verified.edge: M — registrational binary with two-sided risk (durability/safety AESI), cash runway to Q1-2028 removes financing overhang; but milestone is well-telegraphed/reiterated (partly priced) and exact data date is soft ("mid-2026")
verified.primary_source: Neurogene IR "Recent Achievements and Anticipated 2026 Key Milestones" + Q1-2026 financial results 8-K (SEC accession 000140464426000038), May 2026; FDA BTD PR dated 2026-02-26
verified.kill_fact: All load-bearing facts confirmed against primary sources. Neurogene Q1-2026 release (May 12, 2026; SEC 8-K + StockTitan mirror): '~90% of participants have been dosed in the Embolden registrational trial...on track to complete dosing in the second quarter of 2026' and 'present updated interim safety and efficacy data...including at least 12 months of follow-up for all 10 participants, in mid-2026.' Cash $243.2M through Q1-2028. FMP live quote: $26.49 (-3.6%), mcap $418.6M, year-high $37.27 — all match the line. FDA Breakthrough Therapy granted Feb 26, 2026 (BusinessWire/IR) = priced tailwind, correctly identified as NOT the edge. Today 2026-06-06: both binaries (Q2 dosing completion through Jun 30; mid-2026 12-month efficacy/safety readout) are forward, dated, single-asset clinical events — NOT fired. Minor nuance only: readout is split pediatric + adolescent/adult cohorts but still all 10 at >=12mo as stated. Thin options acknowledged. No hidden disqualifier.
verified.analysis: Confirmed via Neurogene IR + Q1-2026 earnings (May 2026): Embolden registrational dosing on track to complete Q2-2026 with ~90% already dosed, and updated interim Ph1/2 safety+efficacy with >=12-month follow-up on all 10 pediatric/adolescent-adult participants due mid-2026 — a genuine dated, forward, single-asset binary, not yet fired. FDA Breakthrough Therapy (granted Feb 26, 2026) is a tailwind but already priced, so it is not the edge; the unpriced event is the actual 12-month efficacy/safety readout. Stock $26.49 (vs $37 year-high), $419M mcap, cash to Q1-2028; not a macro bet.

verified.lane: forced-seller overhang clearing (SNF divestiture); secondary activist-structural
verified.catalyst: Binding $560M cash sale of 35 NHC-leased SNF/IL properties to National HealthCare Corp (NHC), HSR early-termination granted and buyer termination-rights waived May 26 2026, expected to close on/about July 1 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: Closing on/about July 1, 2026 (HSR cleared + buyer waiver both dated May 26, 2026)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty NHC) + G2 (concrete $560M binding PSA); G3 FAILS — no specific unpriced capital-return figure (proceeds go to debt paydown + reinvestment, not a special dividend/buyback)
verified.edge: L — terms public since Apr 21 and re-confirmed May 26; closing is a near-mechanical de-risked event, and residual move is largely a rate-sensitive REIT/macro bet (stock at $70.43, ~11% below 200-DMA, near 52wk low $68.47)
verified.primary_source: NHI Form 8-K filed May 26, 2026 (HSR early termination + buyer waiver; sec.gov, CIK 0000877860); NHI press release / 8-K Apr 21, 2026 ($560M NHC PSA, July 1 2026 expected close, Nasdaq/investors.nhireit.com)
verified.analysis: All hard facts verify: a binding $560M cash PSA with named counterparty NHC, HSR early-termination granted May 26 2026, buyer's Review-Period termination right waived the same day, and a hard July-1-2026 close — so G1/G2 and the dated/forward/not-fired tests pass. But G3 fails: NHI states proceeds fund debt repayment and new private-pay investments (no special dividend or buyback), so there is no specific currently-unpriced figure to re-rate, and the deal economics (pro-forma net-debt/EBITDA ~2.3x, ~$1.4B liquidity, SHOP ~22%) are already disclosed. The remaining upside into a de-risked, fully-public closing is thin idiosyncratically and is dominated by a rate/macro REIT bet, so this is a WATCH (real dated milestone) rather than ACTIVE — downgraded from the triaged 7.

verified.catalyst: Rezpegaldesleukin Phase 3 ZENITH-AD (atopic dermatitis) initiation in 2Q26/by July 2026 plus a Q4 2026 REZOLVE-AA 24-week off-treatment durability readout, but the near-term catalyst the triage cited (52-wk REZOLVE-AA extension on Citi's 30-day watch) already fired April 20, 2026.
verified.dated_milestone: Phase 3 ZENITH-AD start by July 2026 (first readout not until mid-2028); next data inflection = REZOLVE-AA 24-week off-treatment durability data Q4 2026.
verified.instrument: stock (long-dated calls only if playing Q4 2026 durability; no near-term event to size around)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 partial (named: Citi Buy, $123 PT, NKTR on 30-day upside catalyst-watch — but that watch was set April 20 ahead of an event that has since fired). G3 fails: no specific currently-unpriced near-term figure; the SALT20 21-25% datapoint Citi flagged has been reported.
verified.edge: L — anchor catalyst fired April 20, 2026; Phase 2b/52-wk extension drove the re-rate (yearLow $7.99 -> $109 high, now $57), so asymmetry is largely priced and the named forward events are a logistical trial-start (no data) plus a Q4 2026 durability readout 5+ months out.
verified.primary_source: Nektar IR / PRNewswire "52-Week Topline Results from 16-Week Blinded Treatment Extension of REZOLVE-AA" (April 20, 2026); StreetInsider "Citi Adds NKTR to 30-Day Upside Catalyst Watch List" (April 20, 2026); Nektar guidance via search — ZENITH-AD start by July 2026, REZOLVE-AA 24-wk off-treatment data Q4 2026, T1D data 2027 (as of June 6, 2026).
verified.analysis: The triage thesis is mostly stale: the 52-week REZOLVE-AA extension data that put NKTR on Citi's 30-day upside catalyst watch already reported on April 20, 2026 (stock surged then; now $57.32, -3.4% today, having pulled back from a $77 50-day avg after a $7.99->$109 12-month re-rate), so the catalyst has FIRED and is largely priced. What remains is genuinely forward but not near-term and not a data inflection — the Phase 3 ZENITH-AD start by July 2026 carries no readout (first data mid-2028), while the only real unpriced clinical binary is the Q4 2026 REZOLVE-AA 24-week off-treatment durability data. With G3 unmet (no specific currently-unpriced figure) and the headline catalyst already triggered, this stays a low-conviction WATCH rather than ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: Joint Phase 3 topline readout of KOASTAL-2 + KOASTAL-3 (navacaprant/NMRA-140 in MDD), two redesigned >400-patient trials run after the KOASTAL-1 miss, expected 2Q26.
verified.dated_milestone: Joint KOASTAL-2/-3 topline data — next date: 2Q26 (by June 30, 2026), reaffirmed in May 2026 Q1 update
verified.instrument: equity (NMRA, $1.63; busted-biotech long w/ optional long-dated calls — runway funds readout)
verified.bloom_gates: G3 (specific currently-unpriced figure): navacaprant valued near-zero in a ~$302M cap that is funded into Q3 2027; G1/G2 N/A (no counterparty/commitment — single-asset binary)
verified.edge: M — genuinely dated, forward, idiosyncratic binary on a heavily de-rated name ($1.63 vs $3.65 52wk high, near $0.72 low), but it is a coin-flip clinical event with directional risk, not a structurally mispriced certainty; KOR-antagonist class and KOASTAL-1 fail lower the base rate.
verified.primary_source: Neumora "2026 Pipeline Strategy and Anticipated Upcoming Milestones," Jan 5, 2026 (joint 2Q26 readout, runway into Q3 2027); reaffirmed Q3-2025 + May-2026 Q1 updates; FMP quote $1.63 (June 5, 2026)
verified.kill_fact: All load-bearing facts confirmed vs primary sources. May 7, 2026 Q1 release (GlobeNewswire): KOASTAL-2/-3 'on track for joint topline readout in the second quarter of 2026' and '$147.1M cash... into the third quarter of 2027' = forward + funded through catalyst. Jan 5, 2026 pipeline release: each study enrolled >400 pts, 25% above original 332 target, joint readout. FMP quote: $1.63, mktcap $302M, 52-wk low $0.716 = near-zero navacaprant pricing confirmed. KOASTAL-1 was an outright MADRS miss (both arms +12.5 pts), so a redesigned coin-flip pair, not high-prob re-rating — 6/ACTIVE well-calibrated. NOT-YET-FIRED as of June 6, 2026: no topline reported. Caveat the line omits: active securities-fraud investigation (Schall Law Firm, Mar/Apr 2026) = real overhang but not a thesis-killer.
verified.analysis: Confirmed: Neumora's KOASTAL-2 and KOASTAL-3 (each enrolled to ~25% above the original 332-pt target, i.e. >400 pts) are slated for a JOINT topline readout in 2Q26, reaffirmed in the Jan 5, 2026 pipeline update and the May 2026 Q1 results; cash runway extends into Q3 2027 so the company is funded through the catalyst, supporting the busted-biotech optionality thesis. The event is dated, forward (not yet reported as of June 6, 2026), idiosyncratic (not a macro bet), and the market prices navacaprant near-zero (~$302M cap, stock near 52-wk lows), making a positive readout a genuine unpriced asymmetry. Capped at 6/ACTIVE rather than higher because it is a single redesigned trial pair following an outright KOASTAL-1 MADRS miss — a true coin-flip with meaningful downside, not a high-probability re-rating; gap: per-trial exact N and the precise readout day within 2Q are not individually disclosed.

verified.catalyst: New Providence Acquisition Corp III (NPAC) is taking digital-asset wealth platform Abra public via a $750M definitive de-SPAC (combined co. ABRX on Nasdaq), pending an effective S-4 and a shareholder vote.
verified.dated_milestone: S-4 must go effective then shareholder vote (record/vote date not yet set as of 2026-06-06); hard outside date Oct 15, 2026.
verified.instrument: NPAC common (de-SPAC arb: ~$10.35 vs trust; warrants/rights for optionality on close)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named: Abra + New Providence; rollover investors Adams Street, Blockchain Capital, Pantera, RRE, SBI) and G2 (concrete: definitive BCA signed 3/16/26, $40M min net-cash condition, targeting >=$150M transaction financing, signed sponsor/support/lock-up agreements)
verified.edge: L — gates pass on existence, but it is a structurally weak digital-asset SPAC: low $40M min-cash bar (high redemption risk on a crypto target), no vote/record date scheduled, and the next hard catalyst (S-4 effectiveness) is unscheduled with only the distant Oct 15 outside date as a backstop; NPAC at ~$10.35 (mktcap $320M) sits at trust, so no asymmetric pre-deal mispricing.
verified.primary_source: SEC Form 425 / 8-K, New Providence Acquisition Corp III (CIK 0002048948), dated 2026-03-16 (sec.gov; corroborated by CoinDesk 2026-03-16 and StockTitan filings); current quote FMP NPAC $10.35 as of 2026-06-06.
verified.analysis: Verified real and forward: a definitive business combination agreement (announced/signed March 16, 2026) takes Abra Financial public at a $750M pre-money equity value via NPAC, with named rollover investors, a $40M minimum-net-cash closing condition, and a ~$150M financing target — so Bloom G1 and G2 clear and the catalyst is not yet fired (NPAC trades at ~trust, ~$10.35). The weakness from triage holds: it is a redemption-prone crypto de-SPAC with no scheduled vote and only an Oct 15, 2026 outside date, so there is no near-term hard date and no pre-deal edge to capture. Net: a legitimate dated forward de-SPAC but low-conviction — WATCH for S-4 effectiveness / vote-date setting, not actionable now.

verified.catalyst: Nurix presents an incremental Phase 1a/b update of BTK-degrader bexobrutideg (NX-5948) in R/R CLL "across lines of therapy" in an oral session at EHA2026.
verified.dated_milestone: EHA2026 oral presentation (abstract S150, session s449), June 14, 2026, 11:00 CEST, Stockholm; next date = 2026-06-14.
verified.instrument: equity (NRIX); long-dated calls into Jun-14 viable but binary asymmetry is poor given the already-high established ORR bar.
verified.bloom_gates: G3 only (partial) — a specific dated clinical figure, but the figure (~83% ORR) is already disclosed/priced, so it is NOT a currently-unpriced number; no G1 named counterparty and no G2 concrete corporate commitment.
verified.edge: L — incremental refresh of an already-public dataset with a very high prior bar (ORR 80.9%->83.0%, mPFS 22.1mo at ASH Dec-2025); the value-driver pivotal Phase 2 is NOT what's being shown, so upside is capped and sell-the-news risk is elevated.
verified.primary_source: Nurix IR press release "Nurix Therapeutics Announces Bexobrutideg Oral Presentation at the 2026 European Hematology Association Congress," ir.nurixtx.com / GlobeNewswire, 2026-05-12 (corroborated by Nurix ASH 2025 release, 2025-12-06).
verified.analysis: The catalyst is genuinely real, dated, and forward: Nurix's May 12, 2026 IR release confirms an EHA2026 oral presentation of updated Phase 1a/b CLL data for bexobrutideg on June 14, 2026 (~8 days out). However it is an incremental same-trial update against an already-disclosed high bar (ORR ~83%, mPFS 22.1mo per ASH Dec-2025), not the pivotal Phase 2 that actually drives the thesis, so it fails the strict G3 "currently-unpriced figure" test and offers modest asymmetry with material sell-the-news risk. NRIX trades $14.64 (-4.2% on the day, below the 50d MA, mid 52wk range) — not a de-risked/coiled setup that would offset the limited binary edge, so WATCH rather than ACTIVE.

verified.catalyst: Union Pacific is acquiring Norfolk Southern for 1.0 UNP share + $88.82 cash/share (~$320 at signing) in an $85B stock-and-cash deal pending Surface Transportation Board approval.
verified.dated_milestone: UP/NS must file STB-ordered supplemental information by Jul 27, 2026 (proceedings currently in abeyance); STB final decision expected late-2026/2027, deal close targeted early 2027.
verified.instrument: stock (long NSC vs deal consideration; or merger-arb pair long NSC / short ~1.0 UNP)
verified.bloom_gates: G1 (named counterparty Union Pacific, definitive agreement, both shareholder votes ~99% passed Nov 14 2025) + G3 (specific currently-unpriced deal terms: $88.82 cash + 1.0 UNP/share fixed exchange ratio)
verified.edge: M — wide spread (~15% gross) reflects real binary STB risk + rival-railroad opposition, not a free lunch; edge is the hard Jul-27 milestone date and statutory STB clock, but the long timeline to early-2027 close and regulatory uncertainty (abeyance, Trump-floated 15% gov stake) cap conviction.
verified.primary_source: STB.gov press release PR-26-13 (decision May 28 2026, supplemental info due Jul 27 2026) and NS 424B3/DEFM14A deal terms ($88.82 cash + 1.0 UNP share); shareholder approval per Norfolk Southern newsroom Nov 14 2025. Quotes via FMP as of 2026-06-06: NSC $313.45, UNP $272.32.
verified.kill_fact: All load-bearing facts independently confirmed vs primary sources. Terms (1.0 UNP + $88.82 cash, ~$320/$85B EV) verified via UP press release 2025-07-29 + SEC filings. Both shareholder votes passed 2025-11-14 (NS ~99%, UNP 99.5%). STB pr-26-13 (2026-05-28) accepted revised application but held proceedings in abeyance with supplemental info due 2026-07-27 and NO final-decision date set — catalyst is unfired/forward, not FIRED. Live spread confirmed: NSC $313.45 vs consideration $361.14 (UNP $272.32 + $88.82) = ~15.2% gross, matching the ~15% claim and far wider than the ~5% triage figure; UNP +3.19% today matches the +3.2% day. Material regulatory risk genuine: BNSF/CN/CPKC/CSX called the application incomplete; Trump floated a 15% federal stake (railroads declined). Tradeable large-cap merger-arb; the wide spread is the market pricing STB risk and an early-2027 close, not a disqualifier.
verified.analysis: Genuine, dated, forward complex merger-arb: definitive UP/NS agreement, both shareholder votes passed Nov 14 2025 (~99%), now gated solely on STB. STB accepted the revised application May 28 2026 but held proceedings in abeyance pending supplemental info due Jul 27 2026, with a decision late-2026/2027 and close targeted early 2027 — so the catalyst is unfired and forward. Live spread is ~15% gross (NSC $313.45 vs $361.14 consideration at UNP $272.32, wider than the ~5% triage figure after UNP's +3.2% day), compensating for material regulatory risk from BNSF/CN/CPKC/CSX opposition calling the application incomplete and a floated government-stake idea.

verified.catalyst: Nutrien is running self-initiated strategic-alternatives reviews to divest/restructure its Phosphate business, Trinidad nitrogen (already shut down), Brazilian seed business, and Brazil retail to lift earnings quality and FCF.
verified.dated_milestone: Soft-dated: Phosphate "optimal path solidified in 2026"; Brazilian seed sale expected H2 2026; Brazil retail review concludes by year-end 2026. No hard date. Next readthrough: Q2 2026 earnings (~early Aug 2026).
verified.instrument: equity (NTR) — no clean optionable single-event date to express it
verified.bloom_gates: Fails G1 (no named counterparty — only "significant initial expressions of interest"), G2 (soft language "solidify the optimal path," no committed sale of material legs; only the explicitly "immaterial" Brazilian seed business is a concrete sale), and G3 (no dollar proceeds disclosed for any asset).
verified.edge: L — review is widely reported (Q1 call, SEC 6-K, Zacks/Seeking Alpha coverage) and the recent +17%/6mo move is a potash-price/cost-cut story, not a breakup re-rating; no discrete unpriced figure or date to underwrite.
verified.primary_source: Nutrien Q1 2026 earnings call transcript, May 7, 2026 (via AOL); corroborated by Nutrien SEC Form 6-K FY2026 and Zacks (2026-06-05).
verified.analysis: The portfolio simplification is genuine and self-initiated but soft-dated with no named buyer, no committed proceeds, and only "expressions of interest" — management language ("solidify the optimal path in 2026") doesn't even commit to a sale of the material Phosphate/Trinidad assets, and the one concrete sale (Brazilian seed, H2 2026) is called immaterial. With no hard milestone, no activist, and a currently macro/commodity-driven equity narrative, it clears the WATCH bar but not ACTIVE. Re-rate after Q2 2026 earnings (~Aug) if a named counterparty, binding timeline, or proceeds figure emerges.

verified.catalyst: Two FDA-accepted NDAs with firm PDUFA decision dates — zidesamtinib for ROS1+ NSCLC (9/18/26, standard review) and neladalkib for ALK+ NSCLC (11/27/26, Priority Review).
verified.dated_milestone: Zidesamtinib PDUFA 2026-09-18; neladalkib PDUFA 2026-11-27 (next dated event 9/18/26).
verified.instrument: stock (NUVL); longer-dated Sep/Nov calls could express the binary, but IV likely rich into duals.
verified.bloom_gates: G2 (concrete dated regulatory commitment: FDA accepted both NDAs with firm PDUFA dates). G1 N/A (regulatory, no counterparty). G3 FAILS — peak-sales (~$2.5B) and approval odds are consensus, not unpriced.
verified.edge: L — approval is consensus on strong pivotal data (ARROS-1 ORR up to 47%, breakthrough/orphan; ALKOVE-1), already in every model. Sell-side uniformly bullish (PTs $135-$189, all Buy/Outperform); both readouts are well-flagged "shots on goal," so the dated binaries are largely priced and asymmetry is muted.
verified.primary_source: Nuvalent PR / FDA NDA acceptances via StockTitan & Investing.com (neladalkib Priority Review, PDUFA 11/27/26) and PRNewswire (zidesamtinib NDA acceptance, PDUFA 9/18/26), dated Nov 2025; FMP quote $90.95 as of 2026-06-06.
verified.analysis: Triage claim verified and corrected: company is Nuvalent (NUVL), not "Nuvation Bio." Both PDUFAs are real, dated, forward (not fired) — zidesamtinib 9/18/26 and neladalkib 11/27/26, both NDAs accepted, the latter under Priority Review. But the setup is a high-probability approval of consensus-strong pivotal data with $135-$189 analyst targets vs ~$91 spot and a $6.7B cap that already embeds the launches, so the dated-binary asymmetry is muted rather than mispriced. Real dated forward catalyst => keep on WATCH (not ACTIVE) for a possible vol/dislocation entry closer to dates, score 5.
